Describe the sequence of visual elements shown from the start of the video until the bartender begins gesturing.
canonical_answer: At 0s, a layered drink graphic is displayed with red school text; at 10s, a man in a red shirt appears behind a bar counter; at 14s, he gestures with his right hand towards a martini glass; at 18s, he stands near a metal shaker and liquor bottles.

question: Outline the specific barware and background details visible after the title card fades.
canonical_answer: At 10s, a man in a red shirt stands before shelves of liquor bottles; at 14s, a clear martini glass and mixing glass are on the counter; at 16s, two metal shaker tins are visible near his hands; at 18s, bottles with red pour spouts line the background shelves.
